_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: AeroVM
author: aerovm@sosuku325.dev
description: Lightweight QEMU-based VM for Pterodactyl. Free and open source.

installation.script:
#!/bin/sh
# AeroVM has no install-time setup: the VM disk is created and provisioned
# on first boot by /start.sh. This no-op just lets Pterodactyl mark the
# server as successfully installed.
echo 'AeroVM: no installation steps required.'
exit 0

variables.name: VM RAM (MB)
variables.description: Amount of RAM allocated to the VM in MB. Independent of Pterodactyl's memory limit.

variables.name: VM CPU Cores
variables.description: Number of vCPU cores allocated to the VM. Keep this at or below the physical core count of the node.

variables.name: VM Disk Size (GB)
variables.description: Size of the virtual disk image in GB.

variables.name: Display Mode
variables.description: How to access the VM. ssh: console via Pterodactyl port. vnc: raw VNC (port 5900). novnc: browser-based VNC (port 6080). spice: SPICE protocol (port 5900). rdp: RDP (port 3389, cloud-init images only). none: headless. vnc/novnc/spice/rdp on a cloud-init image automatically install a desktop environment on first boot. vnc/novnc/spice/rdp all require their port to also be assigned as an Allocation in the panel.

variables.name: Additional Ports
variables.description: Extra ports to forward into the VM. These ports must also be assigned as Allocations in the Pterodactyl panel. Comma-separated. Use hostport-guestport or single port. Example: 8080-80,443

variables.name: Enable UEFI
variables.description: Boot the VM with UEFI firmware (OVMF). Disable for legacy BIOS.

variables.name: Hostname
variables.description: Hostname for the guest OS. Only used by cloud-init images. Letters, numbers, and hyphens, up to 63 characters.

variables.name: Root Password
variables.description: Root/SSH password for the guest OS. Only used by cloud-init images. Leave blank to auto-generate a random password (printed to the console on first boot).

variables.name: Public SSH Key
variables.description: SSH public key for the guest OS. Only used by cloud-init images. If set, SSH password authentication is disabled.

variables.name: Update Packages on Boot
variables.description: Update all packages on every boot. Only used by cloud-init images. May add startup time.

variables.name: IPv4 Port Forwarding
variables.description: disabled: only the primary SSH port is forwarded, Additional Ports is ignored. user: forward Additional Ports (default). all: also forward ports 1-1024; can noticeably slow down VM startup.

variables.name: Overwrite Host
variables.description: Overwrite the host/product name shown inside the VM (e.g. in neofetch, dmidecode). Leave blank to show QEMU's default. Must not contain commas or quotes.

variables.name: Overwrite IP
variables.description: Overwrite the host/IP shown in the vnc/novnc/spice/rdp connection info printed at startup. Useful when running behind a tunnel or reverse proxy.

variables.name: Banner
variables.description: Custom banner printed before the VM starts. Supports newlines (\n) and Bash color codes.
